source.detail: "TaN RSS I41md 0.10 900 900 395 B" (Table 1, p. 8); prose: "exceptionally high thermal conductivity of 900, 900, and 395 W m-1 K-1 along the three lattice directions when accounting for four-phonon scattering processes" (p. 9). Probing the Limit of Heat Transfer in Inorganic Crystals with Deep Learning (D. Donadio group), arXiv:2503.11568
